title: narcissus ganymedoides
intro: Narcissus ganymedoides, also known as the large white narcissus or great snowdrop, is a perennial plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers and narrow, dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anthelmintic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Narcissus ganymedoides include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
